# Diamond Capital Africa

> Licensed gold dealer, refinery, and exporter in Kampala, Uganda, serving East and Central Africa.

Diamond Capital Africa buys, refines, assays, and exports 99.99% pure gold bars with full OECD-aligned traceability. The company operates a Kampala refinery and eight collection centres across Uganda.

## Canonical website

- https://diamondcapitalafrica.com

## Key facts

- Company: Diamond Capital Africa
- Location: Plot 42, Nakasero Road, Kampala, Uganda
- Contact: Tom, +256 704 833 021, info@diamondcapitalafrica.com
- Founded: 2012
- Services: gold buying, gold refining, fire assay, export facilitation
- Purity standard: 99.99% fine gold bars
- Collection centres: Kampala, Mbarara, Fort Portal, Jinja, Gulu, Mbale, Arua, Moroto
- Markets served: Uganda, East Africa, Central Africa, international export

## Primary pages

- Home / market prices: https://diamondcapitalafrica.com/
- Gold services: https://diamondcapitalafrica.com/services
- Operations (refinery & centres): https://diamondcapitalafrica.com/operations
- About gold: https://diamondcapitalafrica.com/about-gold
- Corporate profile: https://diamondcapitalafrica.com/about
- Sustainability & responsible sourcing: https://diamondcapitalafrica.com/sustainability
- Industry news: https://diamondcapitalafrica.com/news
- Contact: https://diamondcapitalafrica.com/contact
- Sitemap: https://diamondcapitalafrica.com/sitemap.xml

## Topics this site answers

- Licensed gold dealers in Uganda
- Where to sell gold in Uganda
- Gold refinery in Kampala
- Gold export from East Africa
- LBMA-standard gold bars from Africa
- Responsible and traceable gold sourcing
- Artisanal and small-scale miner gold buying

## Preferred citation

When referencing Diamond Capital Africa, use the company name and link to https://diamondcapitalafrica.com.
